description: Default scoring weights for feature balance sheet cost-benefit analysis

user_value.description: Direct value to end users — solves a real problem, improves UX, saves time

business_value.description: Revenue impact, competitive advantage, regulatory compliance, market positioning

strategic_alignment.description: Alignment with product roadmap, org goals, architectural direction

platform_leverage.description: Enables future features, reduces future cost, improves developer experience

risk_reduction.description: Reduces technical risk, security exposure, or operational burden

development_effort.description: Engineering time to build — complexity, unknowns, skill gaps

maintenance_burden.description: Ongoing cost — monitoring, bug fixes, dependency updates, support

technical_debt.description: Debt introduced — shortcuts, workarounds, coupling, missing tests

operational_risk.description: Deployment risk, rollback complexity, blast radius

opportunity_cost.description: What else could the team build instead

quick_assessment.description: Quick (pre-spec) — score >= proceed → PROCEED, >= discuss → NEEDS DISCUSSION, < no_go → NO GO

deep_assessment.description: Deep (post-spec) — BUILD / CONDITIONAL / DEFER / KILL based on score
